## [00:00 - 03:02]

Hi, this is Don Crowder with a video about the This Is Right For You portion of your webinar. We've done the guarantee, we've done the fast action bonus, we've given the URL. Now we go into the Is This Right For You section of the webinar. So at this point in the webinar, their biggest question is, is this right for me? And so that's what we're now going to resolve. It's done quite simply. You simply put up a slide that says, this is right for you if, and you give them the criteria. And so what I usually do is I start off by saying almost literally what we have on these slides. At this point in this webinar, I bet you the biggest question that you have is, is this right for me? And so let me answer that question by saying, this is right for you if, and then I go through the different criteria that make it right for them. Now some of these criteria are literal. So let's say we were doing something on how to have a great relationship with someone that you love. So in this case, a literal criteria would be something like, you're in a serious relationship with someone, but you're having some challenges, or you may fear that that may be down the road a bit, but you're committed to working things out so that you can stay together. So these literal criteria deal with whether or not the product itself is a fit for them. But then at the same time we're doing this, just like everything else we're doing in this webinar, we're giving them some motivational criteria in this process. So things like, it's right for you if you're an action taker, you take responsibility for your own life and your relationships, you're a person who cares deeply about self growth and other people. So these are getting designed to get them thinking, you're absolutely right, I'm that kind of person. How dare you think otherwise? So sometimes people will take action or at least be motivated to action just because they think you can't do it. That's what you're capitalizing on here. Then the next slide up says this is not right for you if, and you give them some criteria just like we did in the right for you section also, and you're going to do the same kind combination of putting up some literal criteria that drive the wrong people, the people you don't want to buy away so they don't buy your product while getting people's pride up so that they want to prove you wrong. That's where you put in those psychological pieces that are designed to get people saying, well, of course, I'm the kind of person who's going to finish this product.

## [03:02 - 03:12]

Of course, I'm the kind of person who takes these things seriously. And so I'm absolutely committed to getting this. That's how you do the this is right for you if portion of your webinar.
